# fixture-vite-web

A fixture Vite web app.

## Highlights

- Built with TypeScript, JavaScript.
- Uses Vite.
- Keeps the repository layout straightforward to scan.
- Includes clear setup, run, and test instructions.
- Includes a web application workflow with clear local development commands.

## Getting Started

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

## Scripts

- `dev`: `vite`
- `build`: `vite build`
- `test`: `vitest run`

## Testing

```bash
npm run test
```


## Project Structure

```text
./index.html
./package.json
./src
./tsconfig.json
```
